name: Annual Energy Cost Savings
short_description: Calculate Annual Energy Cost Savings from an Energy Efficiency Upgrade

inputs.name: original_cost
inputs.description: Original annual energy cost in dollars

inputs.name: saving_percentage
inputs.description: Expected percentage saving from the upgrade

name: New Financing Rate after Basis Point Reduction
short_description: Calculate the new annual financing rate after a reduction in basis points from an initial rate.

inputs.name: initial_rate
inputs.description: The initial annual financing rate, as a percentage (e.g., 5 for 5%).

inputs.name: reduction_bp
inputs.description: The reduction in financing cost given in basis points (1 bp = 0.01%).

name: Annual Savings from Sustainable Supply Chain Integration
short_description: Calculates the total annual cost savings resulting from integrating sustainable practices into a supply chain, considering both percentage cost reduction and fixed synergy benefits per unit, multiplied by annual production volume.

inputs.name: original_cost_per_unit
inputs.description: Original cost of a single unit.

inputs.name: reduction_percentage
inputs.description: Percentage reduction in unit cost from process re-engineering (e.g., enter 10 for 10%).

inputs.name: fixed_savings
inputs.description: Additional fixed savings per unit from synergy benefits.

name: Net Savings from Cost Reduction and Tax Incentives
short_description: Calculates the total net annual savings from both operational cost reductions and government tax credits on project expenses.

inputs.name: annual_op_cost
inputs.description: The annual operational cost of the company or project.

inputs.name: op_reduction_percent
inputs.description: The percentage reduction in annual operational costs.

inputs.name: project_expenses
inputs.description: The total expenses incurred for the sustainable operational improvement project.

inputs.name: tax_credit_percent
inputs.description: The percentage of tax credit received on the total project expenses.

name: Overall Net Impact from Multi-Phase Social Impact Investment
short_description: Calculates the total net financial impact of a social impact project by summing savings from operating cost reduction, efficiency improvements, and government subsidies across multiple phases.

inputs.name: initial_op_cost
inputs.description: The initial operating cost that will be reduced in Phase 1.

inputs.name: phase1_reduction_percent
inputs.description: The percentage reduction in initial operating cost for Phase 1 (e.g., 10 for 10%).

inputs.name: fixed_saving_per_unit
inputs.description: The additional fixed saving per unit due to improved efficiency in Phase 2.

inputs.name: annual_production
inputs.description: The annual production volume for Phase 2, used to calculate total efficiency savings.

inputs.name: total_project_cost
inputs.description: The total cost of the project, used as the basis for the government subsidy in Phase 3.

inputs.name: subsidy_percent
inputs.description: The government subsidy percentage of the total project cost for Phase 3 (e.g., 5 for 5%).
